title: Concept Definition Review online appendix
author: Molenaar, Sabine
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Online appendix CDR method 
 This online appendix accompanies the original article  Concept Definition Review: A Method for Studying Terminology in Software Engineering . 
 Online appendix structure 
 The online appendix contains folders for phases 2 through 6 of the CDR method. Each folder contains a separate  readme  file to explain the contents of the folder and the Excel files that can be considered the deliverables of the specific phases. 
 Phases 1 and 7 are not included in the online appendix, since all information and deliverables related to these are fully contained within the article. 
 Phases 2 and 3 have been combined as their artifacts are highly connected. 
 Therefore, the structure of the appendix is as follows: 
 
 Search protocol (phases 2 and 3) 
 Screening and appraisal (phase 4) 
 Extract data (phase 5) 
 Analyze data (phase 6) 
 
 Furthemore, the folder  Appendix B  describes the lessons learned from the application of the first version of the CDR method. A separate  readme  file is included there.
